mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (username, password, email, role_id) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{email}, #{roleId})
mapper.select: SELECT u.id AS user_id, u.username, u.password, u.email, u.status, u.created_date, u.updated_date, r.id AS role_id, r.role_name FROM users u LEFT JOIN roles r ON u.role_id = r.id

SELECT u.id AS user_id, u.username, u.password, u.email, u.status, u.created_date, u.updated_date, r.id AS role_id, r.role_name FROM users u LEFT JOIN roles r ON u.role_id = r.id WHERE u.username = #{username}
SELECT u.id AS user_id, u.username, u.password, u.email, u.status, u.created_date, u.updated_date, r.id AS role_id, r.role_name FROM users u LEFT JOIN roles r ON u.role_id = r.id WHERE u.id = #{id}
